---
title: "Prichard"
---

## Prichard

### Description

friend of Edward and Mary Coleridge

### Biography

The Mrs Pritchard or Prichard referred to in letters to the Rev. Edward Coleridge and his wife Mary is assumed to be one person.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 8th [1873]
- Letter from  Novr 9th 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
